text: Chat now opens as its own full screen
Pick your own time for each meal reminder — like 11:00 AM
Cleaner header — update alerts are now a banner
Settings: turn on meal reminders and weekly summaries, contact the developer, delete your account
Dark mode — toggle it from the top bar
Weekly summary notification on Sunday evenings
Pick which Google account to use when signing in
Email sign-in now uses a 6-digit code entered in the app
Daily meal reminders — turn them on in Settings
